note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: SMTP AUTH (LOGIN/PLAIN) over STARTTLS on the submission port 587; or implicit TLS on 465.
keyEndpoints: MAIL FROM / RCPT TO / DATA -> submit message

expectedFailureResponseShape.relayDenied: 550 5.7.1 Relaying denied  OR  554 5.7.1 Sender address rejected

commonIntegrationFailure: 535 auth failure (wrong credentials), 550 relaying denied (sender/recipient not permitted), or STARTTLS not offered so credentials would be sent in clear (must abort).
diagnosticCommand: Test-NetConnection smtp.example.local -Port 587; then openssl s_client -starttls smtp -connect smtp.example.local:587 -crlf
preventionRule: Require STARTTLS before AUTH; use a permitted SPF/DKIM-aligned MAIL FROM; never send credentials without TLS; store the SMTP password as a vault reference.
